scripts.dev:all: npm run db:seed && (npm run agent & npm run dev)
scripts.db: docker start finance-erp-db 2>/dev/null || docker run --name finance-erp-db -e POSTGRES_USER=erp_user -e POSTGRES_PASSWORD=erp_password -e POSTGRES_DB=finance_erp -p 5432:5432 -d postgres:16
scripts.db:seed: npm run db && sleep 2 && docker exec -i finance-erp-db psql -U erp_user -d finance_erp < agent/seed.sql
scripts.agent:install: cd agent && ([ -d .venv ] || python -m venv .venv) && . .venv/bin/activate && pip install -q -e .
scripts.agent: npm run agent:install && cd agent && . .venv/bin/activate && python main.py
scripts.stop: pkill -f 'python main.py' 2>/dev/null || true; pkill -f 'next dev' 2>/dev/null || true; docker stop finance-erp-db 2>/dev/null || true
scripts.clean: npm run stop && docker rm finance-erp-db 2>/dev/null || true; rm -rf agent/.venv
